summary: Android application for online selling (marketplace/classifieds app similar to OLX)
architectural_notes: Real-time chat/messaging system between buyers and sellers
known_issues: Chat messages are not being delivered to sellers when buyers send them
Messages are still failing to send after attempted fix
Chat interface is prompting for receiver phone number when it should auto-populate from the listing context
Unable to post listings - add creation is failing
Ads/listings are not displaying on the home page
My Chats interface is not working - users cannot open messages or reply
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- OLS marketplace logo with shopping cart icon, colorful 'OLS' text (purple, orange, green), and magnifying glass, featuring 'On-Line Selling' tagline below. Use the uploaded image IMG-20260223-WA0852.jpg as reference (ols-logo.dim_400x300.png)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that displays a grid of product listings with images, titles, prices, and seller information
Implement product listing creation form where authenticated users can post items for sale with title, description, price, category, and image upload
Implement user authentication using Internet Identity to enable users to create and manage their listings
Create product detail page showing full product information, seller contact details, and seller profile link
Implement category filtering to allow users to browse listings by category (e.g., Electronics, Vehicles, Real Estate, Fashion, Home & Garden)
Create user profile page where sellers can view and manage all their active listings with options to edit or delete
Implement search functionality to allow users to search listings by keywords in title or description

Apply a modern marketplace visual theme with warm, trustworthy colors (earth tones with accent colors), clean card-based layouts, clear typography for pricing, and a professional look that encourages buying and selling
Render generated marketplace images including hero banner and category icons as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
Update all price displays throughout the application to show Indian Rupees (INR) format with the ₹ symbol instead of default currency formatting
Update the price input field in the listing creation form to display INR currency symbol and accept numeric input appropriate for Indian Rupees
Update the price input field in the listing edit form to display INR currency symbol and maintain consistent currency formatting with the creation form
Replace Internet Identity authentication with mobile number (phone number) based authentication system that allows users to log in using their phone number
Update the frontend authentication hook to integrate mobile number authentication, replacing the useInternetIdentity hook while maintaining the same interface for the rest of the application
Update the Layout component header to display the user's mobile number when authenticated, replacing the current principal display
Add a chat button or contact option on the product detail page that allows buyers to initiate a conversation with the seller
Implement a chat interface component that opens when the buyer clicks the chat button, displaying a conversation view with the seller's phone number
Create React Query hooks for chat operations including sending messages, fetching conversations, and polling for new messages
Add a chat/messages section to the user profile page showing all active conversations with unread message indicators
Verify and fix the frontend chat mutation hook to properly handle message sending errors and provide user feedback when message delivery fails

Verify and fix the frontend chat mutation in useQueries.ts to ensure it correctly calls the backend sendMessage function with all required parameters and properly handles both success and error responses.

Add user-visible error feedback in ChatDialog.tsx to display specific error messages when message sending fails, including details about what went wrong (e.g., authentication issues, network errors, backend validation failures).

Add frontend error handling in CreateListingPage.tsx to display specific error messages when listing creation fails, including details about what went wrong (e.g., authentication issues, network errors, backend validation failures, image upload problems).

Add a 'My Chats' or 'Messages' navigation button/link on the HomePage that allows authenticated users to quickly access their conversations. The button should display an unread message count badge when there are unread messages.
Integrate the existing useQueries chat hooks to fetch conversation data and calculate unread message counts for the My Chats navigation button badge on the HomePage.

Debug and fix the HomePage component to ensure all product listings/ads are displayed in the grid. Verify that the useListings query hook is correctly fetching data from the backend getAllListings function and that the ProductCard components are being rendered for each listing.

Rename all occurrences of 'My Listing' or 'My Listings' to 'My Ads' throughout the application, including the ProfilePage tabs, navigation elements, page titles, and any user-facing text that references user listings.
Verify and fix the frontend useListings query hook in useQueries.ts to ensure it correctly calls the backend getAllListings function and properly handles the response data structure
Fix the HomePage component to ensure ProductCard components render correctly for all listings returned by the useListings query, with proper error handling for missing or malformed listing data

Verify and fix the frontend createListing mutation hook in useQueries.ts to ensure it correctly calls the backend createListing function with all required parameters including mobile authentication context

Enhance error feedback in CreateListingPage.tsx to display comprehensive error messages when listing creation fails, showing specific details about authentication state, missing fields, image upload issues, or backend validation errors

Debug and fix the ChatDialog component in frontend/src/components/ChatDialog.tsx to ensure it opens correctly when accessed from the My Chats section, properly loads conversation history, and allows users to send and receive messages

Verify and fix the ConversationList component in frontend/src/components/ConversationList.tsx to ensure conversations are clickable and properly trigger the ChatDialog to open with the correct conversation context (listing ID, seller/buyer phone numbers)

Debug and fix the ProfilePage messages tab in frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx to ensure it correctly renders the ConversationList component and handles conversation selection/navigation without errors

Verify and fix the useConversations and useMessages query hooks in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts to ensure they correctly fetch conversation data from the backend and handle loading/error states properly

Add comprehensive error logging and user feedback throughout the chat flow (ConversationList, ChatDialog, ProfilePage messages tab) to identify and display specific issues preventing users from opening or replying to messages

Debug the HomePage component in frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx to identify why product listings are not rendering in the grid. Add console logging to track the useListings query response, loading state, error state, and the listings array data structure.

Verify that the useListings query hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts is correctly calling the backend's getAllListings function and properly transforming the response data. Add error handling for cases where the actor is not initialized or the backend call fails.

Fix the ProductCard component rendering logic in frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx to handle edge cases where listing data might have missing or undefined fields. Add null checks and default values for title, price, imageUrl, and category.

Add comprehensive error feedback in HomePage.tsx to display specific error messages when listings fail to load, including details about network errors, backend unavailability, or data parsing issues. Show a user-friendly error message with a retry button.
Add 'Smartphones' as a new category option in the CategoryFilter component alongside existing categories (Electronics, Vehicles, Real Estate, Fashion, Home & Garden)
Update the CreateListingPage form to include 'Smartphones' in the category dropdown selection options
Update the EditListingPage form to include 'Smartphones' in the category dropdown selection options
Generate a smartphone icon image for the Smartphones category button in the CategoryFilter component and render it as a static asset in frontend/public/assets/generated

Reorder the categories array in CategoryFilter component to place 'Smartphones' as the first category option (after 'All Categories'), moving it before Electronics, Vehicles, Real Estate, Fashion, and Home & Garden

Add a brand filter dropdown or tag selection component for the Smartphones category that displays popular mobile brand names including Apple, Samsung, OnePlus, Xiaomi, Realme, Vivo, and Oppo when the Smartphones category is selected
Update CreateListingPage form to include a brand dropdown field that appears when Smartphones category is selected, with options for Apple, Samsung, OnePlus, Xiaomi, Realme, Vivo, Oppo, and Other
Update EditListingPage form to include a brand dropdown field that appears when Smartphones category is selected, pre-populating with the existing brand value if available
Update ProductCard and ProductDetailPage components to display the brand name for smartphone listings, showing it prominently near the title or category badge
Update the useListings query hook to support filtering by brand when a brand is selected in the Smartphones category filter

Update CreateListingPage form to require category selection as the first mandatory step before displaying any other form fields. The category dropdown must be visible and required immediately, and all other fields (title, description, price, image upload, and category-specific fields like brand) should only appear after a category is selected.

Update EditListingPage form to follow the same category-first pattern: display the category dropdown prominently at the top (pre-populated with the existing listing's category), and show all other fields including category-specific fields (like brand for Smartphones) below it in a logical order.

Update CreateListingPage form field order to display category selection at the top, followed by brand dropdown (when Smartphones category is selected), followed by all other form fields (title, description, price, image upload) in a logical sequence
Add the uploaded OLS logo image (IMG-20260223-WA0852.jpg) to the application as the primary branding logo, displaying it in the header/navigation area of the Layout component

new_feature_requests.summary: Create Android marketplace app with buying and selling functionality
Create backend data model for product listings with fields for title, description, price, category, seller ID, image reference, creation timestamp, and status
Change currency display from default to INR (Indian Rupees)
Implement customer authentication using mobile number (phone number login)
Update the backend to store and retrieve user data based on mobile number instead of Internet Identity principal
Add chat functionality to enable buyers to message sellers directly from product listings
Update all website branding, headers, and footer references from the current marketplace name to 'OLS' throughout the application
Create backend data model for chat messages with fields for sender phone number, receiver phone number, listing ID, message text, timestamp, and read status
Implement backend functions to send chat messages, retrieve conversation history between buyer and seller for a specific listing, and mark messages as read
Debug and fix the backend chat message sending function to ensure messages are properly stored and associated with the correct seller phone number when buyers send chat messages from product listings
Add error logging and validation in the backend to check that required fields (sender phone number, receiver phone number, listing ID, message text) are present when storing chat messages
Test and fix the conversation retrieval function to ensure sellers can see messages sent to them in their conversations list on the profile page

Debug and fix the backend chat message sending function in main.mo to identify why messages are failing to send. Add comprehensive error logging to trace the execution path when sendMessage is called, including parameter validation, state updates, and return values.

Fix the root cause preventing chat messages from being stored in the backend. Verify that the sender phone number, receiver phone number, listing ID, and message text are correctly received and processed by the sendMessage function.

Update the ChatDialog component to automatically populate the receiver phone number from the listing's seller phone number when the chat is initiated from a product detail page, eliminating the need for users to manually enter the receiver's phone number
Verify that the ProductDetailPage correctly passes the seller's phone number from the listing data to the ChatDialog component as a prop
Update the chat message sending logic in ChatDialog to use the pre-populated receiver phone number instead of prompting the user for it

Debug and fix the backend createListing function in main.mo to identify why listing creation is failing. Add comprehensive error logging to trace parameter validation, image blob storage, state updates, and return values when createListing is called.

Fix the root cause preventing listings from being created in the backend. Verify that title, description, price, category, seller phone number, and image data are correctly received and processed by the createListing function, and that the listing is properly stored in the listings array.
Add a 'My Chats' or messages access option on the home page for users to quickly check their messages
Fix the home page to display all ads/listings (currently ads are not showing)
Rename 'My Listing' to 'My Ads' throughout the application for consistent terminology
Debug and fix the backend getAllListings function to ensure it correctly retrieves and returns all stored listings from the listings array in main.mo

Debug and fix the backend createListing function in main.mo to identify and resolve the root cause preventing new listings from being created, including validation of all required parameters (title, description, price, category, seller phone number, image blob)
Fix My Chats interface so users can open messages and reply (currently unable to access or use chat functionality)

Verify that the backend getAllListings function in backend/main.mo is returning the listings array in the correct format expected by the frontend, including all required fields (id, title, description, price, category, imageUrl, sellerPhone, createdAt).
Add smartphones category or smartphone listings to the marketplace

Move Smartphones category to first position in category filters and add popular mobile brand names (e.g., Apple, Samsung, OnePlus, Xiaomi, Realme, Vivo, Oppo) as sub-categories or filters under Smartphones category
Update the backend Listing data model and createListing function to include an optional brand field for smartphone listings
Update CreateListingPage form to require category selection first, then dynamically show category-specific fields (e.g., brand dropdown for Smartphones) based on the selected category
Reorder CreateListingPage form fields to display in sequence: 1) Category selection first, 2) Brand dropdown (if Smartphones category), 3) All other fields (title, description, price, image upload)

Update EditListingPage form field order to match CreateListingPage, displaying category at the top (pre-populated with existing value), followed by brand dropdown (when Smartphones category), followed by all other fields
Add user-provided logo to the application (branding/visual asset update)
